question: Which maintained embedded storage, host encryption, and key-protection combination satisfies C4/C11-C13 without custom cryptography?
context: Low-confidence feasibility item: run /lex:spike before planning to test C4/C11-C13 plus UC-LEDGER-007/012 outcomes—owner-only permissions, encrypted-at-rest posture, consistent backup, verification, restore, atomic migration/upgrade, and recovery-key behavior.
